changeSet.author: Eugene A. Kalosha
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE cybersecurity_tools ( id serial, organization_id integer DEFAULT NULL, name character varying (255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', description text DEFAULT NULL, created_by_id integer DEFAULT NULL, updated_by_id integer DEFAULT NULL, created_at timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), updated_at timestamp without time zone NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), CONSTRAINT pk_cybersecurity_tools PRIMARY KEY (id) , CONSTRAINT fk_cybersecurity_tools_to_organization FOREIGN KEY (organization_id) REFERENCES organizations (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION , CONSTRAINT fk_cybersecurity_tools_to_created_by FOREIGN KEY (created_by_id) REFERENCES users (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION , CONSTRAINT fk_cybersecurity_tools_to_updated_by FOREIGN KEY (updated_by_id) REFERENCES users (id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE NO ACTION ON DELETE NO ACTION ); CREATE INDEX i_cybersecurity_tools_organization ON cybersecurity_tools (organization_id); CREATE INDEX i_cybersecurity_tools_organization_id_name ON cybersecurity_tools (organization_id, name); CREATE INDEX i_cybersecurity_tools_name ON cybersecurity_tools (name); CREATE INDEX i_cybersecurity_tools_created_at ON cybersecurity_tools (created_at); CREATE INDEX i_cybersecurity_tools_created_by ON cybersecurity_tools (created_by_id); CREATE INDEX i_cybersecurity_tools_updated_by ON cybersecurity_tools (updated_by_id);
INSERT INTO cybersecurity_tools (id, organization_id, name, description) VALUES (1, null, 'Firewall', 'Prevents unauthorized access to or from a private network. This a basic cybersecurity tool and most SMEs will also have firewalls. A firewall monitors all outbound traffic to a network and detects possible attacks. It cannot detect malicious activities that originated within the network.') , (2, null, 'Policies', '') , (3, null, 'Intrustion Detection System (IDS)', 'Monitors networks or systems for malicious activity against established baselines or signatures and detects policy violations.') , (4, null, 'Encryption', 'The process of scrambling data in such a way that only authorized parties can access it.') , (5, null, 'Pen Testing', 'Test where cybersecurity professionals will use the same techniques utilized by criminal hackers to check for potential vulnerabilities and areas of weakness.') , (6, null, 'Security Awareness Training', 'Automated tool that trains employees in best practices regarding cybersecurity policies and to prevent phishing.') , (7, null, 'Vulnerability Management System (VMS)', 'Tool that uses software in a cyclical manner to identify and classify vulnerabilities.') , (8, null, 'Security Incident Event Management (SIEM)', 'Provides real-time analysis of security alerts generated by applications and network hardware to identify brute force, viruses and firewall attacks.') , (9, null, 'Data Loss Prevention (DLP)', 'Tool that provides rules to identify when data is accessed by authorized users and sent outside the organization and add additional rules to prevent unauthorized data leakage.') , (10, null, 'Advanced Threat Prevention (ATP)', 'Identifies malware, quarantines it, and allow it to be analyzed and identified in and between organizations.') , (11, null, 'Cyber Simulation (SIM)', 'Automated approach to more effective train Cybersecurity Operations (SOC) teams to adequately respond to evolving threats.') , (12, null, 'Cyber Threat Intelligence (CTI)', 'Works in the deep and dark web to identify hackers and track their malicious activities. CTI provides detailed information about potential or current attacks that threaten an organization.') , (13, null, 'Secure Cloud Gateway', '') , (14, null, 'Endpoint Protection', '') , (15, null, 'GRC', '') , (16, null, 'Security analytics', '') , (17, null, 'User Behavior Analytics', '') , (18, null, 'Ransomware Prevention', '') , (19, null, 'Security Automation', '') , (20, null, 'Archer GRC', '') , (21, null, 'Network Traffic Analysis', '') , (22, null, 'Security Orchestration', '') , (23, null, 'Malware Detection', '') , (24, null, 'Identity and access management (IAM)', '') ; ALTER SEQUENCE cybersecurity_tools_id_seq RESTART WITH 25;
